meta.title: ApplyOS — Your AI Career Agent
meta.description: ApplyOS learns what you truly want — and finds the best jobs for you every day. Whether you're experienced or a student.

hero.subtitle: ApplyOS learns what you truly want — and finds the best jobs for you every day. Whether you're experienced or a student.

features.label: Features
features.title: The app that works for you

items.title: Proactive Job Search

items.title: Auto Documents

items.description: Track all your applications at a glance

problem.label: Traditional Career Portals
problem.text: Optimized for {highlight}. You're treated as a resource — placed the way employers want. Your profile? Secondary. The cognitive load of job searching? Your problem.

solution.label: ApplyOS
solution.text: Built {highlight}. No corporate clients. No placement interests. Just the best matching for you — with as little effort as possible.

jobSeekers.title: For Job Seekers
jobSeekers.subtitle: Professionals, career changers, returning workers
benefits: Create a profile and discover what you truly want
New top jobs daily — proactively tailored to you

students.title: For Students
students.subtitle: Looking for apprenticeships or university programs
benefits: Find out what truly fits you
From "no idea" to a clear plan
Application process guided step by step

steps.title: Create your profile
steps.description: Find out what you really want. The app guides you through interactive profiling — students go through a psychologically grounded model.

steps.title: Discover jobs
steps.description: ApplyOS searches daily for the best matches. Swipe through fitting positions — with an AI score showing how well they match.

steps.title: Apply & Track
steps.description: Generate an AI cover letter, apply via the original listing, and track everything in a Kanban board.

items.question: Is ApplyOS free?
items.answer: Yes, ApplyOS is free on the App Store. All core features — profiling, job search, matching, and pipeline — are available at no cost.

items.question: Where do the job listings come from?
items.answer: Job listings come from the German Federal Employment Agency — one of the largest job databases in Germany with hundreds of thousands of current positions.

items.question: Can I apply directly from the app?
items.answer: ApplyOS redirects you to the original listing where you can apply directly. Before that, the app can generate a tailored cover letter for you.

items.question: What is the psychological profiling for students?
items.answer: Students go through a scientifically grounded personality profiling. Based on the results, the app suggests matching apprenticeships or study programs.

items.question: Is my data shared with companies?
items.answer: No. ApplyOS has no corporate clients. Your data belongs to you and is never sold or shared with third parties.

cta.title: Ready for the next step?
cta.subtitle: Whether job search or career orientation — download ApplyOS for free.

footer.tagline: Your AI Career Agent. Proactive. Personal. Free.
